summary: Execute standalone TrackCenter recheck for image231924_c01 after the strong-pi pODMR job failed its sequence pre-align count gate.
scientific_rationale: A standalone TrackCenter pass at 36.008 kcps was followed minutes later by a pODMR execute failure before acquisition because the sequence auto-align TrackCenter returned only 4.065 kcps across z attempts. This recheck tests current trackability/count health from the last successful tracked position before deciding whether a bounded pODMR retry is justified or whether the candidate/image frame has drifted enough to require re-imaging or moving to another candidate.
expected_evidence: terminal standalone TrackCenter bridge result with tracked position and final_counts_kcps
decision whether c01 remains trackable enough to retry pODMR or should be put on hold pending re-image/next candidate
success_criteria: final_counts_kcps >= 12 to match the sequence auto-align count gate for pODMR
tracked position remains plausibly associated with image231924_c01 or the movement is recorded as drift provenance
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
project lifecycle is canceled or do_not_submit_or_mutate_bridge_queue is true
TrackCenter fails or final counts remain collapsed, in which case do not retry pODMR without re-image/next-candidate review
